description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in Neriak - Fourth Gate.

title: Hunter of Neriak - Fourth Gate II
description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in Neriak - Fourth Gate.

title: Hunter of The Dead Hills
description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in The Dead Hills.

title: Hunter of Tower of Rot
description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in Tower of Rot.

title: Hunter of West Karana (Ethernere)
description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in West Karana (Ethernere).

title: Hunter of West Karana (Ethernere) II
description: This achievement is gained upon defeating the following rare monsters in West Karana (Ethernere).

title: Novice Hunter of the Call
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following achievements:

title: Veteran Hunter of the Call
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following achievements:

title: Acquired Armaments (Bixie Warfront)
description: Various armaments of the crazed stonehive bixies. Don't expect them to part with their weapons willingly.

title: Argin-Hiz Treasures (Argin-Hiz)
description: All the truly beautiful treasure is in the hands of the Sol`Dal away from the grasp of the embers.

title: Bixie Hive Hodgepodge
description: A celebration of all things Bixie. Except the spider parts.

title: Burning Bibelots
description: Flame is the very essence of life for the elves that call Solusek Ro their lord.

title: Dead Relics
description: Beware the dangers of the Dead Hills as you learn of its history and inhabitants.

title: Eager Entomology (Bixie Warfront)
description: An exciting expedition into the wide world of bugs. Some of them can be elusive, so don't give up easily!

title: Elddar Texts (Argin-Hiz)
description: Much of the city's knowledge is held in documents preserved by the Keepers.

title: Ethernere Remnants (The Western Plains of Karana)
description: Strange and unusual artifacts from the Ethernere.

title: Explorers' Relics (Tower of Rot)
description: Baubles and belongings of adventurers that ventured into the Tower of Rot.

title: Fiery Beauty (Argin-Hiz)
description: The natural beauty of Argin-Hiz can be found in the flowers and stones that surround the city.

title: Fourth Gate Flora & Fauna (Neriak - Fourth Gate)
description: Creatures, mushrooms and mosses found in the Fourth Gate.

title: Geological Discoveries (The Western Plains of Karana)
description: Precious minerals that have been uncovered by the massive geographical damage caused by the Ethernere.

title: Hearing the Call
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Influence of the Ethernere (The Western Plains of Karana)
description: Items affected by the bizarre effects of the Ethernere.

title: Kyle's Cadre (The Dead Hills)
description: Antonius Bayle III's first son Kyle marched south of Qeynos with a skilled army to construct a new seat of power for Qeynos. What became of this expedition party has remained a mystery until now.

title: Less Is More
description: There is more to be found in West Karana, Bixie Warfront and Neriak - Fourth Gate.

title: Loathsome Leftovers (Bixie Warfront)
description: Spiders were never at the top of your favorite pets list, and these disgusting remains can tell you why. Be careful to stay off the menu.

title: Look Into The Future
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Makeshift Materials (Tower of Rot)
description: Scrape up pieces of the many materials used in the construction of the Tower of Rot.

title: Matronymic Markers (Neriak - Fourth Gate)
description: For the Teir`Dal of Neriak, the family name is passed down from the mother to her offspring.

title: Military Missives (Bixie Warfront)
description: Messages to and from Bixie military personnel on the front lines.

title: Miniature Meals (Ethernere Tainted West Karana)
description: Miniature grains, fruits, and vegetables produced by the farmers in West Karana.

title: Miraculous Mixtures (Neriak - Fourth Gate)
description: In Neriak - Fourth Gate, there is a tonic for everything from headache to bad luck. It is not uncommon for a citizen to be under the effect of three or more potent potables at any given time.

title: Missing Mementos (Ethernere Tainted West Karana)
description: The tragic remnants of the old lives of West Karana residents.

title: Neriak Book Club (Neriak - Fourth Gate)
description: Various books authored by or of interest to the people and royalty of Neriak.

requirements.label: The Machinations of Navana and Therak

title: Prolific Pollinators (Bixie Warfront)
description: All that honey had to come from somewhere! Track down the various types of flora that were used in it's production.

title: Remnants of Flame (Argin-Hiz)
description: The remains of the wildlife that have adapted to life in Argin-Hiz.

title: Remnants of the Unlucky (The Dead Hills)
description: Many forces are vying for control of the hills. The commonality between all parties is their fragile mortality, as suggested by these fresh remains.

title: Rotten Remains
description: Discover what treasures lie buried in Tower of Rot.

title: Royal Weaponry (Neriak - Fourth Gate)
description: Damaged batttle unworthy weapons cultivated by warriors and members of the two houses.

title: Scattered Civilization (The Western Plains of Karana)
description: Lost trinkets from West Karana citizens, soldiers, and bandits.

title: Separate Ways
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: The Darklight Palace
description: Recover the treasures of Neriak Darklight Palace.

title: The Plaguebringer's Chosen (The Dead Hills)
description: Little is known about the fearsome and aggressive Xulous. The remains of those who have attempted to learn more serve as a reminder to watch your step in their lands.

title: The Source of the Ethernere
description: Learn about the Etherenere as it infects the Western Plains of Karana.

title: The Spared (The Dead Hills)
description: The ogres of the hills do not share their creator's bloodlust. Learn how this tribe escaped the curse of the Rathe Council and of the pacifist culture they have cultivated.

title: Tools to Build a Tower (Tower of Rot)
description: Find remnants of the various implements used to construct the Tower of Rot.

title: Treasures of Neriak (Neriak - Fourth Gate)
description: Various treasures, relics, items of note favored by the royals and their advisors and military leaders.

title: Unnatural Life (Tower of Rot)
description: Ethernere has a strange effect on inanimate objects, as well as what little natural life still exists in the Tower of Rot.

title: Worlds Apart
description: Complete the following achievement:
